recommendations.title: The Price of Money: A Largo Winch Adventure
recommendations.overview: Largo Winch, devastated by the kidnapping of his son, realizes that if he finds those responsible for his bankruptcy, maybe he'll see his son again.

recommendations.title: Rowdy Rathore
recommendations.overview: A small-time thug comes across a young girl who claims him to be her father, following which he realizes he has a lookalike who's being hunted by goons.

recommendations.title: Non Negotiable
recommendations.overview: Hostage negotiator Alan Bender is called to rescue the president from a kidnapping, only to find himself also mediating to save his wife and marriage.

recommendations.title: Tokyo Revengers
recommendations.overview: An unemployed man learns that his ex-girlfriend was murdered. He suddenly finds himself travelling through time to his middle school years and has chance to change the future and save the girl. He aims to rise to the top of the most brutal delinquent

recommendations.title: Walk of Shame
recommendations.overview: A reporter's dream of becoming a news anchor is compromised after a one-night stand leaves her stranded in downtown L.A. without a phone, car, ID or money - and only 8 hours to make it to the most important job interview of her life.

recommendations.title: Vanishing Point
recommendations.overview: Kowalski works for a car delivery service, and takes delivery of a 1970 Dodge Challenger to drive from Colorado to San Francisco. Shortly after pickup, he takes a bet to get the car there in less than 15 hours.

recommendations.title: Laid to Rest
recommendations.overview: A young girl wakes up in a casket with a head injury and no memory of her identity. She quickly realizes she was abducted by a serial killer and she must fight to survive.

recommendations.title: As Cool as I Am
recommendations.overview: A smart teenage girl comes of age in a small town with her self-centered parents who had her when they were teenagers.

recommendations.title: Stalked by My Doctor: The Return
recommendations.overview: Dr. Beck, who has changed his name, saves a young teenage girl drowning in Mexico, whom he falls in love with. As always, there are some complications in his way, but he has plans to possibly get past them and get the girl of his dreams.

recommendations.title: Mean Dreams
recommendations.overview: When two youngsters meet and fall for each other, they must go on the run from the girl's corrupt father, who is also the sheriff of the town.
